positive: A highly stylized, intricate illustration of a mystical forest scene viewed at twilight. The composition features bold, interlocking silhouettes of ancient, gnarled trees, soaring crescent moons, and stylized woodland creatures (foxes, deer, owls) integrated seamlessly into the foliage. Use a strong negative space focus, emphasizing clean, defined lines and crisp edges. The overall aesthetic should be neo-folk art mixed with esoteric tattoo design, featuring a limited, highly contrasting color palette of deep indigo, forest emerald, and antique gold accents. Center composition, perfect for printing on apparel. --ar 1:1 --s 750
